programme.title: Seinfeld S3E19
programme.desc: Jerry witnesses a hit-and-run and tracks down the driver, but his good intentions get sidetracked when he discovers she's a beautiful woman -- and willing to go out with him. Meanwhile, George flees town when he has an affair with the wife of a belligerent husband whose revenge knows no bounds.

programme.title: Seinfeld S3E20
programme.desc: Jerry's new girlfriend gives his friends Elaine, George and Kramer prime VIP seats to a Yankees baseball game. But when the trio is tossed out for a minor altercation, Jerry backs up his friends and calls it quits with the woman -- until she woos him back with a piece of plagiarized prose.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E1
programme.desc: When Jerry is booked to appear on "The Tonight Show With Jay Leno," he takes George with him to Los Angeles to search for Kramer -- who vanished in a huff months earlier only to pop up inexplicably on TV in an episode of "Murphy Brown." George and Jerry are unaware that their wayward friend is in trouble as a victim of mistaken identity. Meanwhile, George bothers every celebrity he encounters.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E2

programme.title: Colin And Justin's Home Heist

programme.title: Ab Tumhare Hawale Watan Saathiyo
programme.desc: Major General Amarjeet Singh (Amitabh Bachchan) is a dedicated officer for the Indian army. His son Lieutenant Commander Vikramjeet Singh (Bobby Deol) follows in his footsteps and joins the army. Amarjeet is extremely proud of Vikramjeet but tragedy strikes when Vikramjeet is killed in action. Many years pass, Vikramjeet's son Captain Kunal Singh (Bobby Deol) joins the army but has no intentions of remaining there. He instead plans to leave, settle abroad and earn lots of money. Amarjeet is disappointed with Kunal as he hopes his grandson would do something to honour his deceased father. Kunal comes across a desert party and sees Shweta Bhansali (Divya Khosla). It is love at first sight for him but she totally ignores him and does everything to avoid him. However she is doing this for a reason- she was once married. Shweta fell in love and married Major Rajeev Singh (Akshay Kumar), unfortunately he was deployed for action on his wedding day and he had to leave his newly wed bride. That was the last time she saw him. Rajeev has in fact been captured by Pakistani officers, when he refuses to give info on a military operation he is tortured. Eventually Rajeev and other POW's manage to escape.

programme.title: Zero Hour
programme.desc: At the end of the Second World War the cards in global politics were reshuffled. The Allies now made a clear distinction between the friends and foes of democracy. The situation became critical for Franco, because in Spain many suffered from his reign of terror. For that reason, there were many who wanted to topple him.

programme.title: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Secret Societies - The Code of the Illuminati: Since Dan Brown's bestselling novel ‘Angels & Demons', the secret society of the Illuminati has been known to millions. Founded in Ingolstadt in May 1776, the secret society was committed to changing the prevailing systems. The founder, Adam Weishaupt, was a renowned philosopher and theologian who didn't just fight against the oppressive dogmas of the church, but also against the totalitarian forms of government that existed at the time.

programme.title: The Grand Trunk Road
programme.desc: This journey takes us along the precolonial Grand Trunk Road, which stretches across the entire Indian subcontinent. We begin in the mangrove forests of the Bay of Bengal, moving on to Kolkata for the colourful religious festival Durga Puja.

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Beasts of Burden: About twelve thousand years ago, before the Neolithic Revolution, humans were mainly hunter-gatherers. Among the animals we hunted were the wild aurochs, the ancestor of all domestic cattle. The domestication of cows led to the use of oxen as draught animals that could help farmers plough fields.

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Companionship: Throughout history, humans have surrounded themselves with animals. But there are two species that are our undeniable favourites. Every dog today was once a wolf - genetically speaking. Wolves and hominids met as early as 400,000 years ago. Ancient hunter-gatherers and wolves competed for the same prey, and used the same tracking techniques.

programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues
programme.desc: Return of the Bible Plagues - Deadly Waters: “... all the waters that were in the river [Nile] were turned to blood. And all the fish that was in the river died,” reports the Bible, “and the river stank, and the Egyptians could not drink of the water of the river.” (Exodus 7:20–21).

programme.title: Deserts On The Move
programme.desc: Deserts On The Move - Europe: Most school textbooks continue to recite the conventional wisdom that Europe does not have any deserts. They are out of date. Portugal, Spain, Italy and Greece are four EU countries that are already so badly affected that they have joined the United Nations Convention to Combat Desertification (CCD).

programme.title: Electricity: A Bright Idea!
programme.desc: Our distant ancestors were afraid of lightning. Nowadays, Electricity is part of our daily life. Without it, we would feel lost.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile
programme.desc: This is the story of an awe-inspiring land of extremes. From the cold and fearsome waters of Tierra Del Fuego and the Antarctic Peninsula to the frozen Patagonian steppe, we follow the animals living on the very edge of existence, having to survive is some of the most extreme environments on earth. King Penguins court on the windswept coast leopard seals hunt amongst the ice floes and young pumas take their first steps toward independence is this South American final Frontier.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile
programme.desc: Chile is at the mercy of weather systems that have shaped the nation. In the South, strong westerlies bring rains that create rich green Valdivian forests, carpeting the neotropic ecozone. The Valdivian forests of Chile are a unique ecosystem harbouring species of a ‘land before time' – The forests of Valdivia represent the unique assemblage of ancient species, both floral and faunal, which today persist as relicts of Gondwanaland.

programme.title: PTAC0101
programme.desc: The African penguin is the only penguin species in Africa. Their clumsy demeanour has seen them called the Charlie Chaplins of the bird world. But they are struggling to escape extinction. Despite the protection of their breeding islands, numbers fall. Scientists race to find the answers for the staggering decline. Is there a glimmer of hope for the African Chaplin?

programme.title: Rivers Lifeblood
programme.desc: Rivers flow like veins across the Earth, a lifeline to countless ecosystems. Since the dawn of time they've fuelled the development of animal and human life alike. Habitats in constant flux, they change with the seasons, gradually transforming over time. As we run the river's course, we meet the spectacular animals who depend on it. These waterways are as much as lifeblood to this wildlife as they are to us. They deserve our respect and protection – they're our lifeblood and we must keep them flowing.

programme.title: Manatees on the Move
programme.desc: Manatees, sea cows, these gentle giants go by several names. They were once thought to be beautiful mermaids that could lure sailors to their deaths, though they probably won't win too many beauty contests. To retain their weight, manatees need to eat for 8 hours and consume 8% of their bodyweight every day. And keeping eating also means keeping moving! Thanks to their tolerance of human visitors, manatees have mates everywhere, working tirelessly to ensure they roam the world for generations to come.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile
programme.desc: This is the story of an awe-inspiring land of extremes. From the cold and fearsome waters of Tierra Del Fuego and the Antarctic Peninsula to the frozen Patagonian steppe, we follow the animals living on the very edge of existence, having to survive is some of the most extreme environments on earth. King Penguins court on the windswept coast leopard seals hunt amongst the ice floes and young pumas take their first steps toward independence is this South American final Frontier.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile
programme.desc: Chile is at the mercy of weather systems that have shaped the nation. In the South, strong westerlies bring rains that create rich green Valdivian forests, carpeting the neotropic ecozone. The Valdivian forests of Chile are a unique ecosystem harbouring species of a ‘land before time' – The forests of Valdivia represent the unique assemblage of ancient species, both floral and faunal, which today persist as relicts of Gondwanaland.

programme.title: PTAC0101
programme.desc: The African penguin is the only penguin species in Africa. Their clumsy demeanour has seen them called the Charlie Chaplins of the bird world. But they are struggling to escape extinction. Despite the protection of their breeding islands, numbers fall. Scientists race to find the answers for the staggering decline. Is there a glimmer of hope for the African Chaplin?

programme.title: The Dying King
programme.desc: In the open wilderness of Africa, there are only 20.000 lions living a free life. In the last decade, humans have killed hundreds of thousands– mostly for purely hunting purposes. In the last couple of years, a new industry has developed called the canned hunting, where animals are bred for 4-5 years then released into a confined area. This confined area is created for the sole purpose optimizing the odds of the hunter obtaining a kill. The corpse of the dead, often male, lion is thereby treated as a trophy. Tourists pay up to 40, 000 USD for this 'privilege'.

programme.title: White Lions: Born Wild
programme.desc: The two sisters are born as white as snow in May 2009 in South Africa's Kruger Park. Growing up in this vast, wild wilderness they must not only overcome the same survival challenges that all young lion cubs face, they must also overcome the threats their high visibility brings. In the African bush, anything unusual stands out and is often eliminated by eagle-eyed predators. Will our cubs survive? The odds are stacked against them – 80 percent of all newborn lion cubs don't make it to adulthood.

programme.title: White Lions: Born Wild
programme.desc: ‘White Lions – Born Wild' is a true wildlife story, with strong characters and closely studied behaviour. We follow the cubs' progress as they embark on the pathway to adulthood, learning to hunt, learning to avoid danger, learning to live in their white coats. This is a strong behaviour-led film, a coming-of-age story of a very rare and unusual pair of lions. Through their eyes, we learn what it is really like to be a lion in Africa.

programme.title: Masai Mara: The Big Hunt
programme.desc: When food supply in the Serengeti dwindles, the Masai Mara is a paradise for predators. As the black wildebeests, gazelles, zebras and antelopes make their yearly trip from the south of the Serengeti to the north, nature's best laid trap, the Mara River in Kenya is waiting ahead. Captivating shots filmed under water show how crocodiles prepare for the Big Hunt while other predators lurk on the banks awaiting their bounty. The biggest problems for the migratory animals are the Mara and the Tarek River, where they have to put their lives at risk to get to the other side. A great number of them die as they jump into the river and break their legs, while others are carried away by the drift or drown. Those who are not victims of the river itself risk falling prey to the crocodiles. We entered this unchartered territory, the crocodile domain by heading under water. Follow these predators in and around their habitat and watch prides of lions map out their game plan. In slow-motion, we show you the final showdown between predator and prey. Will it be a successful hunt or will the hoofed animals persevere?

programme.title: Namibia`s Desert Kingdom
programme.desc: Although the dunes are barren, the dry riverbeds show signs of growth. And out of the heat, vast shapes appear. A herd of desert elephants ambles along the dry riverbed sniffing the ground with their lazy trunks. These remarkable creatures can smell the water underground and know where to find it. An abandoned well attracts a troop of chacma baboons, followed by a small herd of oryx and springbok, and finally a group of jackals. None of them has seen the pride of desert lions lying in wait.

programme.title: Dust And Stripes
programme.desc: In a never-ending quest for grass and water, the striped herds undertake an annual epic trek across the vast lunar landscape of the Kalahari's Makgadikgadi Pans. Most of the year, the Makgadikgadi is an inhospitable wasteland of windswept, salt-encrusted pans. For the area's water-dependent zebra, the Boteti River on the western edge of the pans is a dry-season lifeline. However, it is also a death trap, with lions waiting in ambush and crocodiles lurking in dark riverside caves.

programme.title: The Original Fight Club: Animal Fights Caught on Camera
programme.desc: There are many reasons for animals to fight and each have their own weapons and rules of combat. They rarely fight without good reason: usually to defend a patch, secure a meal or to attract a mate. With so many reasons for warfare, life can be a never ending battle – for all creatures no matter how great or small, life is a struggle – but they endure – perhaps because there is a fighter in us all …

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Known as the quintessential party music, Polka is alive and evolving in the great city of Milwaukee. At the beloved festival of Germanfest, Polka Hall of Fame legend Peggy Mueller showcases her traditional roots while The November Criminals share their fusion of polka and hip-hop, making it clear there is something for everyone. From buttonboxes to beers and brats, this is a city full of personality and a deep love for its musical heritage.

programme.title: Beach Battles

programme.title: Cheat Meal
programme.desc: Tyler and Monica head to Virginia Beach where they're tasked by celebrity chef Cliff Crooks to create the ultimate cheat meal for a local restaurateur. Armed with the power of their taste buds, the dynamic duo checks out the best places to eat, including Oishii Burger, Chick's Oyster Bar and Klassic Doughnuts, to build an off-the-charts meal of epic portions.

programme.title: Cheat Meal
programme.desc: Tyler and Monica dive back into Virginia Beach's vibrant food scene to build the ultimate cheat meal for George Culver, the food-loving force behind the popular @iheartfoodvb. From the tropical vibes at Moxy Virginia Beach to the game-filled hangouts at Beachside Social, and the delightful flavors of Oh Mochi, De Rican Chef, and Belvedere South, they pull out all the stops to craft a meal that's as unforgettable as it is indulgent!

programme.title: Cheat Meal
programme.desc: Tyler and Monica head to Galveston, Texas, to create a fiery feast for Concetta, the spice-obsessed owner of Maceo Spice & Import Co. From the coastal vibes at Vida Agave to island-famous eats at The Spot, savory classics at Mario's Seawall, local favorites at Mosquito Cafe, and indulgent sweets from Pattycakes Bakery, they turn up the heat to craft a cheat meal packed with bold flavors and Galveston flair.

programme.title: The Main Event

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This weekend sees the Strongman Champions League Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. Big lifting names such as Graham Hicks , Vidas Blekaitis and Vytatus Lalas are in the startlist to push some big numbers.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The battle of the Dutch will take place this edition in Lichtenvoorde, a place very well known in Holland because of the famous “Black Cross”. The athletes will compete over six heavy events and the winner gets 25 Strongman Champions League ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Set in the beautiful mountain resort Zlatibor, the fifth stage of the Strongman Champions League 2017 sees 14 athletes from across the world competing for the gold medal of SCL Serbia 2017. The event welcomes top-athlete - and odds-on favourite - Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia), who has presented himself in an impressive shape so far. Can his opponents defeat him?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight'. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World's Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer's Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt'?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven't given up yet.

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: Howie's 'long-lost brother' shows up to claim his half of the hotel. Then, Bunny organises a scavenger hunt but accidentally offers up the hotel as the prize.

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: Howie is treated like a hero for saving a squirrel (when really the squirrel saved him)! Then, Poodle attacks the Banana Cabana with Cap'N Fizzy's pirate ship - it's up to Howie to stop her.

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: Octo the safety monitor tries to make the Banana Cabana TOO safe - with dangerous results! Then, Narwhal's biggest fan wins a 'spend a day with Narwhal' contest - but she ends up falling for Howie!

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: Looking for a new challenge, Howie converts the hotel into a minimum security prison. After an unexpected toilet mishap, the Banana Cabana winds up floating on the high seas - becoming a 'boatel'!

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: Poodle builds a robot Howie and uses it to try to take over the Banana Cabana. Then, Narwhal's obnoxious old partner shows up - and wants to put the old act back together again.

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: A bossy Jellyfish sticks himself to Octo's head and starts to take over Octo's personality. Then, Howie gets the TV remote stuck to his head, and develops strange new powers!

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: After several days of bad weather, Duck builds an artificial sun that never goes down. Then, Narwhal confesses his greatest secret ever... he never learned how to swim!

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: When the hotel's rooftop banana goes missing, Howie and Octo set out on an island-wide adventure to find it. Then, Howie's old imaginary friend comes to visit and drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: Octo's scary dreams have him staining his bedsheets in the shape of his pals. Then, Howie challenges Bunny that she can't get through a day without losing her temper.

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: Poodle tries to humiliate the staff at the Banana Cabana by posting embarrassing videos of them online. Then, Octo's unable to set a record in Cap'n Fizzy's Big Book of Unnecessary Accomplishments.

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: Howie and the gang try to throw a surprise Mud Day party for a very suspicious Piggy. Then, Howie becomes a product tester for Dirk Danger's line of extremely hazardous merchandise.

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: Howie needs to collect all of the puzzle pieces to win an exclusive, limited edition can of Cap'n Fizzy's Fuzzy Orange Soda. Then, Howie comes out of 'retirement' to avenge Piggy.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The fate of Earth and Cybertron rests on the Autobots' final battle against Megatron's forces.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Prime tries to resolve a rift between Sumdac and Sari, while Shockwave plans the invasion.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sari's attempt to use her Key on herself ends in disaster.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron seizes the Autobots' ultimate weapon to attack Prime and his crew.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hot Shot and Red Alert are sucked through a wormhole.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hot Shot heads to Cybertron to warn Galvatron while battle rages on.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus is infected Arcee and Bumblebee infiltrate warship to retrieve cure.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron hijacks Bumblebee's mind, controlling him from within Autobot base.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Kids trapped in alternate dimension with reanimated Skyquake after a portal glitch.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobots rescue Breakdown from MECH, despite his Decepticon allegiance.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons trick the population into believing they are "Sky Gods".

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator against the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobot Tracks is damaged while trying to help authorities investigate a plague of car thefts.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Poet And Painter: Because they feel unappreciated, Poet and Painter leave Smurf Village and head for Storm Island, totally unaware that Gargamel is planning to trap them. Papa Smurf and his faithful volunteers rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Mere Truffle: The Smurfs love truffles but truffles belong to the Trolls and the Trolls live under Truffle Troll Mountain, where in the shadows of the lake lurks the Thing with No Name...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lazy's Nightmare: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tick Tock Smurfs: The village of the Smurfs used to live without a clock. But now suddenly time becomes a precious commodity and Brainy Smurf designs a schedule to take advantage of the new Village clock... Can the Smurfs survive the attacks of time?

programme.title: Bringing Up Bigfeet
programme.desc: Remember Bigmouth, the ogre, and his lovely wife Bignose? They have a baby now: tiny (by ogre standards) Bigfeet. As the Smurflings Snappy, Slouchy and Nat, and of course the ever-willing Sassette are not entitled to baby-sit Baby Smurf, they volunteer to watch over Bigfeet, while its parents are at the Ogre Ball. The little Smurfs will get more than what they expected...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Winged Wizard: Determined to fly over Smurf village to catch a Smurf to take to the Wizard's Convention, Gargamel invokes his Book of Spells to help him. A series of funny flying machine mishaps occur and Gargamel is once more the laughing stock of the Wizard's Convention.

programme.title: Skyscraper Smurfs
programme.desc: Sure, a village of mushroom-shaped houses is nice and jolly... But not very modern, in Architect Smurf's view. What the Smurfs need is smurfdominium, a new, daring concept that will change the art of living forever...

programme.title: Secret Of The Village Well
programme.desc: Why is Clumsy Smurf waiting day and night near the Village well? What is the wish that he wants to be kept secret? How is Gargamel going to be mixed up in this mysterious affair? Is Gargamel going to catch the Smurfs at last?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - It's A Puppy's Life: The evil wizard Gargamel has got hold of magical ectoplasmic crystal eggs that will enable him to change bodies with Papa Smurf. What better plan could there be? Disguised as Papa Smurf, he's going to lead all the Smurfs to his cauldron! But as fate would have it, Gargamel is changed into Puppy, the Smurf doggie...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfstone Quest: In the distant valley of Nodrog, the Smurfs meet the Molians who try to dissuade them from obtaining the magical Smurf-stone that Papa Smurf needs to cure his gout.

programme.title: The Man In The Moon
programme.desc: Sick and tired of not being appreciated, the Man in the Moon quits his job and retires on Earth, to the Village of the Smurfs. The absence of a First Quarter Moon wreaks havoc in the customs of the Smurfs, and Mother Nature and Father Time get dragged in...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Time Capsule: As the Smurfs busily build a time capsule for all of their talents, Papa Smurf frantically tries to unravel an ancient Druid riddle before disaster strikes the forest.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfily Ever After: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Clockwork Smurf: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Flighty's Plight: Flighty Smurf, as his name implies, can't make his own mind up about anything. The other Smurfs take him to the forest for a survival test in which he can find his way home only by making decisions. He ends up in Balthazar's castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Last Laugh: Gargamel has found a new diabolical scheme to get rid of the Smurfs: a glittering powder that is going to reduce them to helpless laughter...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Puppy Prescription: Gargamel conjures a spell that makes Puppy think he's a cat. Papa receives a prescription from Homnibus to reverse the spell and all the Smurfs help. As Puppy becomes a dog again, Gargamel gets too close and he becomes a cat.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Chief Record Smurf: Due to a wild experiment Clumsy is able to store endless knowledge into his memory. Gargamel captures him, trying to unlock Papa Smurf's invisibility formula, but at the last minute, Clumsy tricks him with the wrong ingredients.

programme.title: All Creatures Great And Smurf
programme.desc: Nat Smurf is convinced he can help all creatures with his healing ways, even the wicked Azrael after he gets his paw caught in a trap. He heals well, but even though he is tempted to stay with the Smurfs, he runs back to Gargamel while leading his old master away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Master Smurf: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Rabbids are missing!
programme.desc: When a pilot rabbid disappears, a detective rabbid starts to investigate…

programme.title: The Rabbids VS The Animals.
programme.desc: In the country, two Rabbids become fascinated by a fly.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: The Rabbids are locked up!
programme.desc: The Rabbids are shut inside a supermarket after closing hours.

programme.title: Super Rabbids to the rescue
programme.desc: Beware ! The three rabbids with super powers have the worst plan to get to the moon!

programme.title: The Rabbids rebel.
programme.desc: Thanks to the Teleporta-TV, the rabbids lay hands on a voodoo doll with strange powers…

programme.title: The Rabbids are having fun!
programme.desc: The Rabbids find a cellphone on the sidewalk. They're fascinated by the ring tone.

programme.desc: A sculptor inadvertently compresses the rabbids' rocket ship.

programme.title: The Rabbids VS The Animals.
programme.desc: In the country, two Rabbids become fascinated by a fly.

programme.title: Smile, Rabbids!
programme.desc: When a family tries to take a nice picture at a wedding ceremony, the Rabbids ruin everything.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: The Rabbids are panicking!
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, two Rabbids become convinced that their boss has turned into a balloon.

programme.title: The Rabbids are part of the family.
programme.desc: Three particularly stupid rabbids get banned from the rabbid headquaters and wander about the suburbs.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a blizzard hits Knothole causing Dulcy to demolish a few huts during a landing, Sonic is forced to bunk with Antoine. // During a rainstorm, Rotor is putting the finishing touches on his new female robot assistant, named Ro-Becca.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Orangutango
programme.desc: Donkey Kong and Candy train to compete in a dance contest against King K. Rool and Krusha. Because Donkey Kong can't dance, he wants some help from Funky.

programme.title: SONIC X How to Catch a Hedgehog
programme.desc: After an encounter with Dr. Eggman, Sonic finds himself unable to stop running. Chris and his grandfather Chuck soon discover that Eggman's E-88 is behind Sonic's problem.

programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

But when an innocent AOL chat turns racy, she discovers masturbation and is overwhelmed with guilt. Seeking redemption, she attends a mysterious religious retreat to try and suppress her urges...

programme.title: NYC: Tornado Terror
programme.desc: (2008) Disaster film starring Sebastian Spence. When a deadly jet stream vortex unleashes tornadoes over Manhattan, a race begins to stop the storm before the city is torn apart.

programme.title: Meteor Moon

programme.title: Kill Command
programme.desc: (2016) Sci-fi action with Thure Lindhardt and Vanessa Kirby. A training exercise descends into a fight for survival when a squad of marines encounter advanced AI robots determined to wipe them out.

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-fi action with Ethan Hawke and Succession's Sarah Snook. A temporal agent who stops crimes before they happen is tasked with catching a fugitive who's always one step ahead in time.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: A self-absorbed realtor enlists the help of his neighbor when he's suddenly left in charge of the granddaughter he never knew existed until his estranged son drops her off at his home.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: In this classic romantic comedy, a Brooklyn widow (Cher) is ready to get married again. Only this time, she plans on doing it right, even if she has to say “yes” to a man she doesn't really love.

What starts out as just another day on the job quickly turns into a life-or-death struggle for a soft-spoken American co-pilot when a group of terrorists attempt to take control of his Paris-bound flight.

programme.title: The One
programme.desc: In a stunning dual role, international action star Jet Li portrays Gabriel Yulaw, a police officer confronted with a sinister form of himself escaped from an advanced, parallel universe and intent onkilling Gabriel.

programme.title: Detective McLean
programme.desc: One of Matt's employees gets caught up in a slavery ring and turns to Allison for help. Cameron and Mariah go to visit Tim in jail for his birthday.

programme.title: BMX Bandits
programme.desc: A trio of teen BMX enthusiasts become entangled with a group of bank robbers after discovering their cache of walkie-talkies.

programme.title: Burning Rubber
programme.desc: John Travolta stars in this action-packed, testosterone-fuelled thriller! When his son joins a rival racing team, a retired car racing legend returns to the dirt track, sparking more tension and brutal competition between the father and son duo. Co-stars Hollywood veteran Michael Madsen and global sensation Shania Twain. Sparks are set to fly in this gripping tale rooted in high-speed danger!

programme.title: Beyond Suspicion
programme.desc: On his latest private investigation, a shamed former cop connects a murder case to a government conspiracy involving rogue agents from a top spy agency. a.k.a. Bent

programme.title: Dark Crimes
programme.desc: When a disgraced detective Tadek notices the stark similarities between a murder case and a crime novel written by Kozlow (Marton Csokas), he sees an opportunity to redeem his career. Digging deeper Tadek is soon caught up in a game of cat and mouse, that will reveal a dark truth.

programme.title: Cold Souls: Cold Souls
programme.desc: Paul is an actor who feels bogged down by his participation in a production of Chekov's play, Vanya.

programme.title: Spy Next Door
programme.desc: A former CIA agent hoping to settle down with his girlfriend uses an opportunity to babysit her children as a chance to win them over. However, things take a dramatic turn when an old enemy shows up, forcing him back into his old lifestyle.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: A warrior sets off to get his revenge on the evil warlord who attacked his village and murdered his father.

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: A warrior sets off to get his revenge on the evil warlord who attacked his village and murdered his father.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter is all that stands between humanity and the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter is all that stands between humanity and the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Upside Down (2012)
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: Henry V
programme.desc: King Henry V of England is insulted by the King of France. As a result, he leads his army into battle against France. Along the way, the young king must struggle with the sinking morale of his troops and his own inner doubts. The war culminates at the bloody Battle of Agincourt.

programme.title: Deadly Target
programme.desc: When Special Operative James Webster (Michael Jai White, The Dark Knight, Blood and Bone) returns home from duty to find his brother brutally murdered, his lethal training immediately kicks in. Fuelled by rage and a burning need to avenge his brother, he sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and nothing is going to stand in his way... As he delves deeper to identify the murderers, he finds himself at the centre of a deadly conspiracy and a secret world of corruption one which cuts deep inside the U.S. Government, reaching the very highest levels of command. With a ruthless military assassin (Steve Austin, The Expendables) hot on his trail, Webster must expose the corrupt high-ranking officials before he becomes another victim to the very plot which killed his brother.

programme.title: Adventures of a Taxi Driver
programme.desc: Joe likes the ladies and gets to meet a variety of them in his job as a taxi driver. From dizzy young women to frustrated housewives, Joe fancies them all, and they take a fancy to Joe. If only things were smoother at home for the put-upon cabbie. With his nagging mother, thieving teenage brother, and the attentions of an overbearing girlfriend with ideas of marriage, Joe leaves the homestead and rents the spare room at his best mate's flat. Meanwhile, he continues to find himself in an assortment of humorous sexual escapades until he accidentally becomes embroiled in a jewel heist that doesn't quite go to plan.

programme.title: Mythica
programme.desc: Good and evil battle it out in the fourth gripping adventure from the fantastical franchise. When daring young wizard Marek steals the final piece of the all-powerful Darkspore she embarks on a desperate quest to deliver the cursed artefact to the gods. But is caught in a death race between a ruthless team of elite mercenaries and a trinity of demons.

programme.title: Mythica
programme.desc: The end is here. Join sorceress Marek in the spectacular and gripping finale of the legendary Mythica journey. With a new evil to defeat, Marek embarks on an arduous quest to gain a valuable weapon from the Gods. From battling the Lich King's evil zombie legions to joining forces with her sworn enemy, will Marek save the Gods, the world and herself in time?

programme.title: Awkward Sexy People
programme.desc: Jeff and Anne, two close friends and co-workers in a suburban high school, are embarrassingly unlucky at love. With nothing else to lose, they hatch a plan to transform themselves over the course of a sex-and-alcohol-fueled summer into the cool, confident people they aspire to be. At first an exhilarating adventure of self-discovery, Jeff and Anne's journey turns into a laugh-out-loud experiment as they lose their identities, their dignity, and quite possibly each other.

programme.title: Exposed
programme.desc: In this stylish crime thriller, New York City Detective Galban investigates the brutal murder of his partner. Among the evidence, he finds a photograph of a teacher who he believes may be a vital witness.

programme.title: Dater's Handbook
programme.desc: (2016) Rom-com starring Meghan Markle. Successful in business but unlucky in love, at the advice of relationship expert Dr. Susie, Cass cautiously consults the 'dater's handbook.'

programme.title: A Wish Come True
programme.desc: (2015) Rom-com with Megan Park. On her 30th birthday, Lindsay is granted all her past wishes. When things go awry, she realises that happiness and Mr. Right were there along.

programme.title: To England With Love
programme.desc: (2023) Rom-com with Georgia Hirst. Ali thinks life's perfect - until a historical treasure hunt in England turns her world upside down. Along the way, she discovers her heart's ready for adventure.

programme.title: Love's Complicated
programme.desc: (2016) Rom-com with Holly Marie Combs. People pleaser Leah is enrolled in a conflict management class with her nemesis, shock jock Cinco Dublin. Will the pair learn to see eye to eye?

programme.title: Love On A Limb
programme.desc: (2016) Charming romance with Ashley Williams. When the mayor hires a landscaper to fell a beloved oak tree, Aimie decides to chain herself to it. As a stand-off ensues, will they fall for each other?

programme.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: From the day Pauline (Clemence Poésy) lends him a helping hand on the bus, the stubborn and weary Matthew Morgan (Sir Michael Caine) stumbles back to happiness.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking & optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show, when hot-headed Chef Stephen is dropped into Kelly's life as a last minute replacement host.

programme.title: Diana
programme.desc: Celebrated and adored by millions, she was the Queen of people's hearts, yet the bittersweet story of the last man to truly capture hers has never before. In a story that until now has remained untold, Diana introduces a time in the Princess's life that was important in shaping her final years...

programme.title: Anything Else
programme.desc: Jerry Falk (Jason Biggs), a young writer in New York City, leaves his girlfriend for free-spirited Amanda (Christina Ricci). Seeking advice, Jerry turns to an older, struggling artist who helps him deal with his messy love life.

programme.title: Christmas à la Carte
programme.desc: When food correspondent, CARLY, gets a shot at her own show nothing goes as planned. She's sent to Angel Heights to help GRANT, a chef, reopen her family's beloved diner and film it for her television show.

programme.title: Christmas Wish
programme.desc: When Paula chose Gary over Nick, 15 years later she'd be married, with tons of debt. At Christmas, when Nick reappears, now a rich, successful art broker. A little Christmas magic and she is transported to the life with Nick.

programme.title: Christmas Wedding Runaway
programme.desc: A runaway bride does some soul-searching when she's trapped in a snowed-in cabin with her grandmother and an old flame at Christmas.

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina moves into her friend's suite at The Chesterton Hotel as she waits for her divorce settlement to come through on Christmas Day. While there, she starts a whirlwind romance with a billionaire, who proposes to her.

programme.title: Love Across Time
programme.desc: While inspecting an old British manor for its real estate potential, Chelsea discovers a portal through time that connects with the late 1700s owner of the property. When an accident occurs, the gentleman comes through and gets stuck in the present day.

programme.title: All For Love
programme.desc: Jaded romance novelist Jo Payden has a tight deadline for her latest novel. Her last novel wasn't a big success so when her editor Diana recommends teaming up Colin, a Navy SEAL who also happens to be her brother, she jumps at the opportunity. Jo's enthusiasm quickly turns to dread as she realizes that Colin has signed her up for his Navy SEAL training Boot Camp.

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: American doctor Ivy Miller lives in Bali, working at a charitable health clinic. When a billionaire benefactor named Dylan Donnelly arrives, Ivy is less than impressed. He is only interested in making himself look better by appearing charitable. Ivy is happy when he goes on his way, but then an accident injures one of Dylan's trusted advisors, Blake. Dylan insists Ivy stay at Dylan's lavish estate in Bali to care for Blake until he's well.

programme.title: Bookworm and the Beast
programme.desc: Izzy is ready to make a difference in the world as she starts her career in public relations. When Grant Beiste - the big-headed corporate celebrity in town - accidentally hits her father with a car, Izzy is thrown into a public scandal that forces her to work closely with Grant. As she fights to save both her father and Grant's public image, she falls in love and learns not to judge a book by it's cover.

programme.title: Sorority Surrogate
programme.desc: Student becomes a surrogate, a wealthy couple dies and grandma fights for custody.

programme.title: Deadly Sorority
programme.desc: Samantha and Kristina part ways Kristina's new sorority life leads to her murder.

programme.title: Deadly Sorority
programme.desc: Samantha and Kristina part ways Kristina's new sorority life leads to her murder.

programme.title: Let's Get Physical
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Sadie led a double life with a secret prostitution ring.

programme.title: WWJD What Would Jesus Do?
programme.desc: A group of Americans - a singer, a newspaper editor, a pastor and a real estate mogul - vow to walk in the steps of Jesus. Every day, every decision becomes a turning point in their lives as they must ask themselves "What Would Jesus Do?"

programme.desc: Stylist Rose inherits her grandmother's dress shop and reconnects with her old crush, Cole, sparking romance.

programme.desc: A writer returns to her hometown for inspiration and reinkindles her romance with her first love.

programme.desc: A poet with an abusive husband reaches out to a fan for help, only to find an even more dangerous companion.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: A father finds himself unemployed and decides to turn his home into a day care.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: DADDY DAY CARE pals Charlie and Phil are back in this hilarious, all-new adventure: DADDY DAY CAMP! When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood - serving up sports, crafts and teaching the kids a thing or two about nature, they discover the camp has everything it needs except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame. With some quick thinking, teamwork, a secret weapon and some off-the-wall crazy antics, the dads and kids unite to make sure DADDY DAY CAMP secures its rightful place in kid camp history!

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: Man, Pride & Vengeance
programme.desc: A stalwart Spanish soldier turns to a life of crime to prove his love for a mysterious and promiscuous gypsy woman.

programme.title: Stranger On Horseback
programme.desc: Circuit judge Rick Thorne arrives in Bannerman and uncovers that rancher Josiah Bannerman and his family control the town. After Tom Bannerman kills a man with no consequence, Thorne steps in and arrests him. As he seeks allies, including Amy Lee, the rancher's niece, Thorne faces pursuit, betrayal, and the challenge of getting Tom to trial.

programme.title: The Covered Wagon
programme.desc: Two wagon caravans converge at what is now Kansas City, and combine for the westward push to Oregon. On their quest the pilgrims will experience desert heat, mountain snow, hunger, and indian attack.

programme.title: The Outlaw
programme.desc: Western legends Pat Garrett, Doc Holliday and Billy the Kid are played against each other over the law and the attentions of vivacious country vixen Rio McDonald.

programme.title: West of the Divide
programme.desc: Ted Hayden impersonates a wanted man and joins Gentry's gang only to learn later that Gentry was the one who killed his father. He saves Virginia Winters' dad's ranch from Gentry and also rescues his long-lost brother Spud.

programme.title: Folly to Be Wise
programme.desc: When Captain Paris takes over at a big army camp as Chaplain and Entertainments Officer, the troops are in for some surprises. Captain Paris finds the Garrison Theatre ill attended, as the troops favor the local hostelries in preference to the succession of feminine string quartets and madrigal singers hitherto engaged for their amusement. Paris sets out to remedy this sad state of affairs, but his idea of staging a Brains Trust with local celebrities as the 'brains' turns out to have disastrous results!

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A harmless s√©ance summons up an unwanted ghost in this Noel Coward play.

programme.title: Hobson's Choice
programme.desc: Harry Hobson is a prosperous provincial bookmaker. He is a widower and his home and business are looked after by his three daughters. Hobson is a contented man and has decided that although he will allow his two younger daughters to marry, the eldest, Maggie, must stay at home and care for him. But Maggie has other ideas and is determined to force her father into letting her have her own way...

programme.title: Constant Husband
programme.desc: An Englishman wakes in a hotel bedroom suffering from amnesia and sets out to find his identity. He tracks down his wife but soon learns that the job she saw him leave for every morning did not exist. He learns to his disgust that that is the least of his lies. He is a cad and bigamist (or, worse, he has seven wives and identities). His female lawyer tries to keep him out of jail, though he prefers incarceration to multiple matrimony.

programme.desc: A road movie about young people who heal their wounds from love through busking in the streets of Vietnam.

programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.desc: (2017) Heart-melting romance with Taylor Cole. A woman determined to keep an annual ice sculpture competition going enlists a charming local artist to help. But will she carve out some time for love?

programme.desc: (2018) Festive fun starring Juliette Angelo. Embarrassed by her family's over-the-top Christmas celebrations, Nicky hires actors to stage some fake festivities for her long-distance boyfriend's visit.

programme.title: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Christmas
programme.desc: (2019) Festive romance with Eric Mabius. When mayoral rivals Liam and Sarah enter a Christmas decorating contest, they end up with more than just Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Detonator
programme.desc: Homeland Security agent attempts to prevent an international arms dealer from setting off a bio-weapon on US soil.

programme.title: The Contractor
programme.desc: James Dial, once a top CIA assassin and now retired, is called back by the CIA to kill a terrorist leader in London. But Dial learns that once his mission is accomplished, he will be next on the hit list, to remove any traces of American involvement. Aided by an 11-year-old neighbor girl, Dial must find a way to stay one step ahead of his hunter.

programme.title: 7 Seconds
programme.desc: When an experienced thief accidentally makes off with a Van Gogh, his partner is kidnapped by gangsters in pursuit of the painting, forcing the criminal to hatch a rescue plan.

programme.title: Casualties Of War
programme.desc: From visionary director Brian De Palma, war is war, but murder is murder. Michael J. Fox and Sean Penn star in this action-packed Vietnam war saga in which one soldier thought he had a license to kill and another dared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Genius
programme.desc: Nicole Kidman and Colin Firth star in this stirring drama about the friendship between Thomas Wolfe and editor Maxwell Perkins (who discovered F. Scott Fitzgerald and Ernest Hemingway).

programme.title: Rex
programme.desc: Rex is based on the true-life story of young Marine Corporal Megan Leavey whose unique discipline and bond with her military combat dog saved many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Detachment
programme.desc: A substitute teacher who drifts from classroom to classroom finds a connection to the students and teachers during his latest assignment.

programme.title: Jobs
programme.desc: Ashton Kutcher is Steve Jobs, the iconic Apple innovator and groundbreaking entrepreneur. This inspiring and entertaining film chronicles Jobs early days as a college dropout, to his rise as the co-founder of Apple Computer Inc.

programme.title: Valkyrie
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as the leader of a group of German officers who hatched a plot to assassinate Hitler. The operation was code-named "Valkyrie," for the emergency plan that was meant to be used in case of a revolt against the Nazi government.

programme.title: Exit Speed
programme.desc: Strangers use improvised weapons, adrenaline and sheer guts to mount a defense against murderous bikers and their survival depends on doing the unthinkable - fighting for their lives!

programme.title: Warriors' Gate
programme.desc: American teenager Jack Bronson is magically transported to ancient China, where he must become a hero and rescue a beautiful princess from the clutches of the evil barbarian king.

programme.title: Heist
programme.desc: Francis 'Pope' Silva is a popular, soon to be retiring casino owner and feared mafia boss. When one of his employees Luke Vaughn desperately needs cash for his daughter's much needed operation...
